articles.title: 6 PRODUCT MANAGER STEREOTYPES TO AVOID
articles.summary: PM roles are often misconstrued and limited by stereotypes such as being perceived as CEOs, strategists, facilitators, process managers, or rainmakers. However, the ideal approach entails embodying a "full-stack PM" mentality that encompasses leadership, collaboration, strategic thinking, user focus, and adaptability to drive meaningful outcomes in product development.

articles.title: THE GOAL OF A “STRATEGY” IS TO CHANGE OUR OWN TEAM’S BEHAVIOR
articles.summary: PMs must effectively translate high-level strategies into actionable guidance for day-to-day decision-making within teams to ultimately deliver better outcomes for customers.

articles.title: IS NPS THE OZEMPIC OF METRICS?
articles.summary: The NPS metric lacks actionable insights and provides empty promises. Better alternatives to better understand and improve customer satisfaction and loyalty include Customer Effort Score, rigorous sampling methods, qualitative feedback, customer journey analytics, and Net Dollar Retention Rate.

articles.title: FREEMIUM TO PREMIUM: HOW COMPANIES NUDGE YOU TO UPGRADE
articles.summary: Nudging can effectively transition free users to premium subscriptions. However, companies should proceed with caution, ensuring they clearly communicate the advantages of upgrading, customize nudges based on user activity, and honor the preferences of their users.

articles.title: PRODUCT OPS: NECESSARY OR NOT?
articles.summary: Product ops serves as an operational bridge that links product, engineering, and customer success. However, introducing a product ops role might merely serve as a temporary fix rather than solving any underlying issues. Leaders should focus on identifying and addressing the root cause of disconnection between product, engineering, and business functions instead of relying on adding new roles for optimization.

articles.title: SCALE AUTOMATED WEB TESTING WITHOUT SCALING HEADCOUNT
articles.summary: You don’t need an army of testers to build, run, and maintain more tests. QA Wolf (4.8 ⭐ on G2) [9] brings AI-level scale and efficiency to testing, with unlimited parallel test runs on their cloud infrastructure and a zero-flake guarantee. 80% automated test coverage [9] in just 4 months. Trusted by Cohere, Autotrader, Salesloft and many others.

articles.title: A BREAKDOWN OF X’S NEW FEATURE, ARTICLES
articles.summary: X recently launched Articles, a long-form content feature with rich editing. The feature has been challenging to integrate into X due to issues with feed previews and posting complexity.

articles.title: HOW TO USE AI IN YOUR COMPANY
articles.summary: Discover practical AI applications to enhance productivity, from AI agents handling administrative tasks to boosting brainstorming, collecting knowledge, automating workflows, and analyzing data. Tools like Adept AI Labs, Strut AI, Rewind AI, Respell AI, and AI integrations in Excel demonstrate AI's transformative potential in simplifying complex tasks and fostering innovation.

articles.title: BRING BACK FUN
articles.summary: There is a diminishing sense of joy and camaraderie in the tech industry, with a shift towards a more serious and competitive environment. Teams should revive fun, challenge, and collaboration to foster better well-being and productivity.

articles.title: THE TRAP OF TYING YOUR IDENTITY TO YOUR JOB TITLE
articles.summary: Focusing too much on job titles and career advancements won't lead to fulfillment. It's crucial to detach our self-worth from our professional roles, adopting a more holistic outlook on success. This perspective values personal development, happiness, and finding roles that align with our unique skills and interests.

articles.title: HOW TO GET AN ENTHUSIASTIC YES
articles.summary: We often need other people’s help to make things happen. The secret to eliciting agreement lies in highlighting the advantages for both parties involved. By focusing on what others stand to gain rather than your own benefits, you provide compelling reasons for them to agree with your proposal.

articles.title: MEASUREMENT ERROR IN UX RESEARCH (3 MINUTE VIDEO)
articles.summary: Measurement error refers to inaccuracies introduced during user observation or measurement, stemming from various sources like participant count, differences among participants, the testing environment, or external influences.

articles.title: 7 STORYTELLING TECHNIQUES
articles.summary: Storytelling techniques include the Hero's Journey, In Medias Res, Flashbacks, Kishoutenketsu, Third-person Narration, Framing, and Yokai - each offers unique ways to engage audiences and articulate product value.

articles.title: WHY I DON’T LIKE THE TERM ‘PRD’
articles.summary: A PRD implies a waterfall approach - strategic problem-solving and collaboration prove more productive than rigid documentation.
